package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for binary_read_for_single_field: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `binary.Read(r, order, &singleField)` for reading a single integer
type CaseBinaryReadForSingleFieldDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBinaryReadForSingleFieldModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBinaryReadForSingleFieldRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBinaryReadForSingleFieldModel
}

type CaseBinaryReadForSingleFieldService struct {
    repo *CaseBinaryReadForSingleFieldRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBinaryReadForSingleFieldAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBinaryReadForSingleField(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBinaryReadForSingleFieldDTO) error {
    focus := "binary_read_for_single_field"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    binary_read_single_field_positive := map[string]int{"binary": 1, "read": 2, "single": 3, "field": 4}
    binary_read_single_field_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    binary_positive_0 := binary_read_single_field_positive["binary"] + len(input)
    _ = binary_positive_0
    read_positive_1 := binary_read_single_field_positive["read"] + len(input)
    _ = read_positive_1
    single_positive_2 := binary_read_single_field_positive["single"] + len(input)
    _ = single_positive_2
    field_positive_3 := binary_read_single_field_positive["field"] + len(input)
    _ = field_positive_3
    return nil
}
